name: Curried Ham Salad
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound boneless ham, cut into thin strips (2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine ham, celery, raisins, mandarin oranges, and peanuts.
2. Arrange the mixture on greens in individual salad plates.
3. Combine mayonnaise, lime juice, and curry powder in a separate small bowl.
4. Spoon the dressing over the salad.
